mapper.select: SELECT dw.id, dw.warehouse_code as "warehouseCode", dw.warehouse_name as "warehouseName", dw.warehouse_type as "warehouseType", dw.address_line1 as "addressLine1", dw.address_line2 as "addressLine2", dw.city, dw.state, dw.pincode, dw.country, dw.latitude, dw.longitude, dw.timezone, dw.contact_phone as "contactPhone", dw.contact_email as "contactEmail", dw.manager_id as "managerId", dw.max_capacity_units as "maxCapacityUnits", dw.current_utilization_pct as "currentUtilizationPct", dw.is_active as "isActive", dw.is_returns_center as "isReturnsCenter", dw.operating_hours_json as "operatingHoursJson", dw.supported_carriers_json as "supportedCarriersJson", dw.total_skus as "totalSkus", dw.total_units as "totalUnits", dw.low_stock_count as "lowStockCount", dw.pending_fulfillments as "pendingFulfillments", dw.created_time as "createdTime", dw.last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.dim_warehouse dw WHERE dw.id = #{id}
